Meet the Heart Behind Elevate Early Learning

Our Story

Tanisha B founded Elevate Early Learning & Consulting with a deeply personal mission. After earning her Master's Degree in Child Development and successfully owning two child care centers, she experienced something that changed everything—the traumatic closure of one of her facilities due to circumstances that could have been prevented with proper guidance.

That experience stayed with her. It became the driving force behind her work today. She knows firsthand the challenges that keep center owners awake at night—the compliance concerns, the safety protocols, the overwhelming feeling of trying to do everything right while keeping children safe and thriving.

Now, she uses that hard-won knowledge to help other directors and owners navigate the same systems. Her goal is simple: prevent others from going through what she did. Every consultation, every policy review, every moment of guidance is rooted in real experience and genuine care for the people she serves.

This isn't just consulting—it's partnership born from experience.

Comprehensive Solutions for Your Child Care Center

Our Services

From instructional support to program development, we provide expert guidance tailored to your center's unique needs.

Instructional Support

Expert guidance on curriculum development, lesson planning, and instructional strategies tailored to early childhood education.

Staffing Solutions

Comprehensive support for hiring, training, and retaining qualified early childhood educators and staff.

Program Development

Strategic planning and systems development to create structured, compliant, and effective child care programs.

Student Engagement

Proven approaches to create active, positive learning environments where children thrive and develop.

Need a service not listed here? We offer customized consulting solutions.

Let's discuss your needs

Get In Touch

Ready to elevate your child care center? We're here to provide guidance, support, and partnership every step of the way. Reach out to discuss how we can work together.
